'''Zho Krazhmir''' was [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces in the [[First Battle of Zonama Sekot]], and the one who agreed to take [[Vergere]] back to the rest of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in return for calling off the attack.

For his discovery of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], he was granted a new leg implant. However, it never developed properly, and he died in his sleep from it several years later, long before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
